summary: GTO Reference Dataset exposes the read API that Table mode uses to compute per-decision deviation scores for hero actions during live play.

get_preflop_range.name: getPreflopRange
get_preflop_range.shape: (position: string, situation: string) => { [hand_class: string]: { action: string, frequency: number, sizing?: number } }
get_preflop_range.purpose: Given hero's position and the action situation (e.g., 'open' / 'facing 3bet from CO'), the table mode looks up the GTO mix for hero's hand class and compares against hero's actual action.

get_postflop_reference.name: getPostflopReference
get_postflop_reference.shape: (spot_descriptor: SpotDescriptor) => { gto_mix: { [action: string]: { frequency: number, sizing?: number } } } | null
get_postflop_reference.SpotDescriptor_shape: { position: string, board_texture: string, prior_action_summary: string, hero_hand_class: string }
get_postflop_reference.purpose: For postflop spots that match a curated reference shape, returns a GTO mix; returns null for spots outside the curated coverage (in which case table mode does not score deviation for that decision and records reason='no_reference').

score_action.name: scoreAction
score_action.shape: (reference_mix: object, user_action: string, user_sizing?: number) => { score_label: string, deviation_score: number }
score_action.purpose: Same scoring algorithm walkthrough uses, exposed for table mode to score live play.

data_passed_not_logic: Table mode passes spot descriptors and actions; section-2 returns mix references and scores. Section-2 does not know about the table; table does not author GTO data.

section-2_owns: GTO data, scoring algorithm, coverage decision (when null is returned)
section-5_owns: constructing SpotDescriptor from live game state, deciding when to call score_action

test_seam: Unit test: for every preflop position, getPreflopRange returns non-empty mix; for at least one postflop SpotDescriptor that matches the curated coverage, getPostflopReference returns non-null; for an unsupported descriptor, returns null.
